name: SCAR-20 | 丛林爆发
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been painted with vibrant shades of green. Valeria is getting bolder... the time has come to take the fight to her - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器使用充满活力的绿色色调进行了涂装。 瓦莱里娅真是愈加胆大妄为…… 与她决一死战的时刻到了 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
